contract.promotion_requirement: direct fixed/loss hits must transfer to the heldout pair replay before promotion
contract.leakage_policy: train objective descriptions and answer terms, never the exact heldout prompt surfaces

source_objective.intent: teach the tiny model to answer the required-term task, not to copy near-exact prompt surfaces

check_rows.detail: contract follows only a ready objective-level contrast plan
plan must request this contract artifact
contract rows must match planned row count
all four planned row families must be present
fixed and loss branch answer rows must be balanced
fixed, loss, and exact pair probes must be preserved
exact eval prompts must not be training rows
heldout pair probe must stay out of training rows
objective-level rows must avoid near-exact pipe/equals prompt surfaces

interpretation.reason: The contract teaches objective-level paired answers while avoiding heldout prompt surfaces.
interpretation.next_action: materialize the objective-level contrast contract and train a fresh tiny checkpoint
